name: Gold rStock
description: Remora Markets opens the door to global financial markets, making tokenized stocks accessible to everyone. Acquired by Step Finance in December 2024, Remora Markets combines deep expertise in blockchain and financial technology alongside compliance and regulatory backgrounds to deliver a seamless investing experience. Remora Markets aims to become Solana's largest and most trusted tokenized stock issuance platform, enabling a global audience to trade and invest with confidence.
